one_law: One row = one client-demo recipe (GOAL · DONE · VERIFY · proof artifact).

items.title: 5-minute eval: sourcea-boot PASS on prospect laptop
items.goal: Prospect clones or pip-installs and sees PASS receipt in under 5 minutes
items.done_when: Eval page has boot markers + validate-sourcea-boot-v1.sh PASS + PyPI resolves
items.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/eval && --marker "data-sa-page=\"sourcea-boot-eval\"" && --marker "pip install sourcea-boot" && bash scripts/validate-sourcea-boot-v1.sh && python3 scripts/probe_sourcea_boot_pypi_v1.py --json
items.client_demo: Screen-share /eval → pip install → PASS line on disk

items.title: Contract SKU live: Operating Brain Install page + proof strip
items.goal: Buyer opens SKU page and sees live proof embed, not placeholder copy
items.done_when: validate-sourcea-contract-pages-e2e-v1.sh PASS for /operating-brain-install
items.client_demo: Open page → scroll proof strip → click read-only demo

items.title: Contract SKU live: AI Value Governance (sourcea.ca mirror)
items.goal: Canadian buyer sees distinct regional page with hreflang + live proof
items.done_when: Contract E2E PASS for /ai-value-governance on sourcea.app and sourcea.ca
items.client_demo: Compare CA vs UK copy — show procurement pack link

items.title: Contract SKU live: Enterprise AI Control Plane (sourcea.uk mirror)
items.goal: UK enterprise buyer sees control-plane narrative + demo panel
items.done_when: Contract E2E PASS for /enterprise-ai-control-plane
items.client_demo: Open #demo read-only panel on contract page

items.title: Live receipt URL returns 200 with proof class metadata
items.goal: Agency prospect verifies a sample job without a sales call
items.done_when: GET /sourcea/proof/live returns 200 JSON with verdict field
items.verify: curl -fsS https://sourcea.app/sourcea/proof/live | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d.get('ok') or d.get('verdict')"
items.client_demo: Paste live receipt URL in outreach — prospect opens in browser

items.title: Forge Terminal public surface loads with governed send path
items.goal: Buyer sees terminal UI and understands policy-before-send
items.done_when: Forge terminal page has terminal UI markers (not SPA shell only)
items.client_demo: Walk ALLOW vs BLOCK beat on terminal page

items.title: Free job CTA: Bring one real job → intake form → storage path
items.goal: Prospect who clicks bring-one-real-workflow lands on sandbox form wired to MVP intake worker
items.done_when: proof-sandbox page markers + mvp-intake-config.json exposes worker API URL
items.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/sourcea/sandbox && --marker "data-sa-page=\"proof-sandbox\"" && --marker "sa-sandbox-intake-form" && --marker "Bring one real job" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && curl -fsS https://sourcea.app/sourcea/data/mvp-intake-config.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d.get('api_worker_url') and 'mvp-intake' in str(d.get('api_worker_url'))"
items.client_demo: Walk CTA → fill 5-field form → show intake API config on disk

items.title: Cloud Forge observer proves motor ran on Railway not Mac
items.goal: Buyer sees headless cloud execution receipt
items.done_when: Railway observer JSON returns ok with execution_plane headless_cloud
items.verify: curl -fsS https://sourcea-fbe-runner-production.up.railway.app/api/cloud-forge-run/queue/v1 | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d.get('ok')"
items.client_demo: Cloud Workers glance → queue head delta after cron tick

items.title: Supabase cloud_forge_run_rows accumulates shipped proof rows
items.goal: Client sees durable audit trail outside chat
items.done_when: cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count returns ok total > 0
items.client_demo: Show row count delta before/after Auto Runtime tick

items.title: Proof export loop page explains weekly client handoff bundle
items.goal: Agency retainer renewal uses exported HTML/PDF not Slack threads
items.done_when: Proof export marketing page returns 200
items.client_demo: Walk boot → replay → procurement pack export order

items.title: Agency onepager attachment is institutional not placeholder
items.goal: Outbound email attaches credible 1-pager with proof row
items.done_when: attach/agency-onepager.html returns 200 with proof language
items.client_demo: Email attach + 15-min screen-share script from page

items.title: Procurement pack attachment for regulated buyers
items.goal: Security/procurement reviewer gets ISO-map educational pack
items.done_when: procurement pack HTML returns 200
items.client_demo: Send pack before security review call

items.title: PureFlow case study shows full Prompt→Proof chain
items.goal: Service operator prospect sees relatable vertical proof
items.done_when: case-studies/pureflow returns 200
items.client_demo: Walk 48h path timeline on case study page

items.title: AgentGo case study shows agency-scale proof narrative
items.goal: Agency ICP sees second foundational proof story
items.done_when: case-studies/agentgo returns 200
items.client_demo: Compare PureFlow vs AgentGo ICP fit in discovery

items.title: Public Brain answers from live knowledge bundle not stale chat
items.goal: Prospect asks pricing question and gets disk-backed answer
items.done_when: Brain worker health returns 200
items.client_demo: Ask Brain a contract SKU question on landing
